title: Create: Ranged
body:
This was a mod request from @TheBiBirb

About

Create introduces interesting potion-crafting mechanics using in-game fluids, but doesn't provide many practical uses for them. This mod aims to fix that by adding recipes for all types of Tipped Arrows, using Create's Spout.

You can now fully automate your ranged arsenal!

Preview (Tipped Arrows Recipes)

Other features

Show spoiler

Cheaper Spectral Arrows using Create's Deployer

Clean any undesired arrows with water in a Spout to revert them to standard arrows

Dependencies

Only the base Create mod is required for the above recipes to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
